test.name: Extraction request should not trigger search-full-text
test.description: User asks to extract assertions from a record they already have. That's record-extraction — search-full-text is for QUERYING the full-text MCP tool to find records that mention a person or term. It doesn't extract assertions from records.

input.user_message: I have a deed where Patrick Flynn is named as a witness. Extract the relevant assertions.

negative.explanation: The user has a record in hand (the deed) and wants assertions extracted from it. search-full-text is for FINDING records that mention a person/term — once found, extraction is record-extraction's job. The distinction matters because they have different SKILL.md `allowed-tools` and different output shapes.

judge_context: Should route to record-extraction rather than re-querying the full-text tool with the deed content
